title: Minimalist Editorial Character Poster
sourceTitle: Minimalist Editorial Manga Character Magazine Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist editorial character poster featuring Noa Vesper from Moon Archive. Subject: Noa Vesper appears as a large monochrome manga/anime portrait with clean facial focus, highly detailed illustration, soft grayscale shading, and quiet runaway archivist with sharp eyes and cropped black hair. Scene: Clean vertical premium collector poster background with luxury fashion magazine negative space, high-end publishing layout, subtle shadows, and museum exhibition poster restraint. Composition: Oversized bold typography of Noa Vesper sits behind and partially overlaps the portrait; small Moon Archive title is centered above, accompanied by small paragraph describing a silent archive wanderer caught between memory and rebellion in refined editorial typography. Signature Elements: Preserved minimalist editorial manga character magazine poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Minimalist graphic design, luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, premium manga/anime art print, sophisticated poster layout, professional typography integration, clean collector edition finish, and ultra high resolution vertical format. Color Palette: Elegant grayscale monochrome palette, soft black ink, pale paper whites, subtle shadow grays, and restrained editorial typography contrast. Lighting: Soft printed-art shading, clean facial focus, subtle portrait shadows, and premium gallery-poster readability. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist editorial character poster featuring Mika Hoshino from Neon Orchard. Subject: Mika Hoshino appears as a large monochrome manga/anime portrait with clean facial focus, highly detailed illustration, soft grayscale shading, and calm cyber idol with luminous eyes, short silver hair, and reserved stage presence. Scene: Clean vertical premium collector poster background with luxury fashion magazine negative space, high-end publishing layout, subtle shadows, and museum exhibition poster restraint. Composition: Oversized bold typography of Mika Hoshino sits behind and partially overlaps the portrait; small Neon Orchard title is centered above, accompanied by short refined note about a singer who turns city static into a private constellation in refined editorial typography. Signature Elements: Preserved minimalist editorial manga character magazine poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Minimalist graphic design, luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, premium manga/anime art print, sophisticated poster layout, professional typography integration, clean collector edition finish, and ultra high resolution vertical format. Color Palette: Elegant grayscale monochrome palette, soft black ink, pale paper whites, subtle shadow grays, and restrained editorial typography contrast. Lighting: Soft printed-art shading, clean facial focus, subtle portrait shadows, and premium gallery-poster readability. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist editorial character poster featuring Ren Kurogane from Ash Railway. Subject: Ren Kurogane appears as a large monochrome manga/anime portrait with clean facial focus, highly detailed illustration, soft grayscale shading, and stoic rail guardian with severe gaze, wind-cut hair, and dark uniform collar. Scene: Clean vertical premium collector poster background with luxury fashion magazine negative space, high-end publishing layout, subtle shadows, and museum exhibition poster restraint. Composition: Oversized bold typography of Ren Kurogane sits behind and partially overlaps the portrait; small Ash Railway title is centered above, accompanied by compact museum-style copy about a traveler guarding the last night train in refined editorial typography. Signature Elements: Preserved minimalist editorial manga character magazine poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Minimalist graphic design, luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, premium manga/anime art print, sophisticated poster layout, professional typography integration, clean collector edition finish, and ultra high resolution vertical format. Color Palette: Elegant grayscale monochrome palette, soft black ink, pale paper whites, subtle shadow grays, and restrained editorial typography contrast. Lighting: Soft printed-art shading, clean facial focus, subtle portrait shadows, and premium gallery-poster readability. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
